chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR _PN0.D-1252 0f2022 Date Order سith signature of J٧٥9٤ For ordani on offilco oblactlons For hgarlng of maln cas% 06092022 Mr Humyun Shaikh advocate for the Petitioner Mr Ahmed Ali Shahni AAG along with Zahid Hussain on behalf of DC Sukkur and Mr Qurban Ali on behalf of Assistant Mukhtiarkar, New Sukkur 7444+++++++++++++ Petitioner is resident of New Goth Sukkur where according to him sewerage line is not working and pungent water has puddled in the area which besides is not being sanitized Learned AAG undertakes tnat proper drive clean the line and remove the puddles of stagnant water sewerage cooperation of Chief Municipal Officer, Sukkur, who made with active the same drive and submit the report in two, directed undertake months Petition is accordingly disposed of would
